text: Hi, thanks for joining today. Can you start by telling us about your experience with distributed systems?
Sure, I'm Rohan. I've worked on backend systems for about 4 years, mostly with Go and Kafka for event-driven pipelines.
Nice. Can you walk us through how you'd design a rate limiter?
I'd probably use a token bucket algorithm backed by Redis so it works across multiple servers.
Great answer. Let's move to a coding question, I'll share my screen.
Sounds good, I'll share my screen too so you can see me code.
